questions.question: What is the average number of patients reported in weekly reports where the number of providers is greater than 100?
questions.reasoning: This query calculates the average of the 'num_patients' attribute for WeeklyReport entities. It filters these reports based on the 'num_providers' attribute being greater than 100. It uses a single entity type, a numeric comparison filter, and an aggregation, satisfying Tier 2.

questions.question: List the epiweeks of weekly reports that have a weighted ILI percentage greater than 2.0.
questions.reasoning: This query retrieves distinct 'epiweek' values from WeeklyReport entities. It applies a filter to include only those reports where 'weighted_ili_pct' is greater than 2.0. This adheres to the single entity type and filter requirements for Tier 2.

questions.question: How many weekly reports have an epiweek that contains '2022'?
questions.reasoning: This query counts WeeklyReport entities where the 'epiweek' attribute contains the substring '2022'. It uses a single entity type and a CONTAINS filter on a string attribute, fulfilling Tier 2 criteria.

questions.question: Which regions have the most weekly reports in the year 2022?
questions.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?region_name (COUNT(?report) AS ?report_count)
FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview>
WHERE {
  ?report <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/type/WeeklyReport> .
  ?report <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/pred/reported_in_region> ?region .
  ?region <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/type/Region> .
  ?region <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/pred/region_name> ?region_name .
  ?report <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/pred/year> "2022" .
}
GROUP BY ?region_name
ORDER BY DESC(?report_count)
LIMIT 10
full_expected_items: HHS Region 3 (DE, DC, MD, PA, VA, WV) | 52
HHS Region 1 (CT, ME, MA, NH, RI, VT) | 52
questions.tier_classifier_reasoning: 2 distinct entity types connected by 1 predicate

FL | 52

CT | 52
HHS Region 1 (CT, ME, MA, NH, RI, VT) | 52
HHS Region 10 (AK, ID, OR, WA) | 52
NV | 52
NY | 52
OK | 52
OH | 52
questions.reasoning: This query joins WeeklyReport and Region entities. It counts the number of weekly reports for each region, filtered by the year '2022'. Both entity types are explicitly typed, and the relationship `reported_in_region` connects them. The filter on the 'year' attribute of WeeklyReport satisfies the filter requirement, and the GROUP BY / COUNT aggregation is used.

questions.question: What are the names of regions that belong to a region type containing 'National' in its name?
questions.tier_classifier_reasoning: 2 distinct entity types connected by 1 predicate
questions.reasoning: This query joins Region and RegionType entities. It retrieves the names of regions whose associated region type name contains 'National'. Both entity types are explicitly typed, and the relationship `has_region_type` connects them. The `FILTER (CONTAINS(?region_type_name, "National"))` satisfies the filter requirement.

questions.question: How many weekly reports are associated with each season?
questions.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?season_label (COUNT(?report) AS ?report_count)
FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview>
WHERE {
  ?report <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/type/WeeklyReport> .
  ?report <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/pred/in_season> ?season .
  ?season <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/type/Season> .
  ?season <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/pred/season_label> ?season_label .
}
GROUP BY ?season_label
ORDER BY DESC(?report_count)
questions.tier_classifier_reasoning: 2 distinct entity types connected by 1 predicate
questions.reasoning: This query joins WeeklyReport and Season entities. It counts the number of weekly reports for each season. Both entity types are explicitly typed, and the relationship `in_season` connects them. The GROUP BY / COUNT aggregation satisfies the filter/aggregation requirement.

questions.question: What are the region types and the number of distinct seasons associated with regions of that type?
questions.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?regionTypeName (COUNT(DISTINCT ?season) AS ?numberOfSeasons) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview> WHERE {
  ?regionType <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/type/RegionType> .
  ?regionType <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/pred/region_type_name> ?regionTypeName .
  ?regionType <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/pred/region_type_includes> ?region .
  ?region <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/type/Region> .
  ?region <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/pred/region_has_report> ?report .
  ?report <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/type/WeeklyReport> .
  ?report <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/pred/in_season> ?season .
  ?season <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/type/Season> .
} GROUP BY ?regionTypeName ORDER BY DESC(?numberOfSeasons)
questions.reasoning: This query uses Option A. It involves three distinct entity types: RegionType, Region, WeeklyReport, and Season. The path is RegionType -> Region -> WeeklyReport -> Season. It counts the distinct seasons for each region type, satisfying the aggregation requirement and the multi-entity, multi-hop criteria.

questions.question: Find the age groups that are associated with weekly reports having more than 1000 ILI cases in any region.
questions.expected_answer: 0-4 years, 5-24 years, 50-64 years, 65+ years, Unknown age
questions.reasoning: This query uses Option A. It involves three distinct entity types: AgeGroup, WeeklyReport, and Region. The path is AgeGroup -> WeeklyReport -> Region. It filters weekly reports based on the 'num_ili' attribute and then finds the distinct age groups associated with these reports. All entity variables have rdf:type triples.

questions.question: What are the labels of regions that reported weekly reports in the year 2022, and what is the count of distinct age groups associated with those reports?
questions.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?regionLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?ageGroup) AS ?ageGroupCount) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview> WHERE {
  ?report <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/type/WeeklyReport> .
  ?report <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/pred/year> "2022" .
  ?report <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/pred/reported_in_region> ?region .
  ?region <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/type/Region> .
  ?region <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> ?regionLabel .
  ?report <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/pred/age_breakdown_for_report> ?ageGroup .
  ?ageGroup <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/type/AgeGroup> .
} GROUP BY ?regionLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?ageGroupCount)

HHS Region 1 (CT, ME, MA, NH, RI, VT) | 5

questions.reasoning: This query uses Option A (3+ entity types connected by a path/star). It involves three distinct entity types: WeeklyReport, Region, and AgeGroup. The path is WeeklyReport -> Region and WeeklyReport -> AgeGroup (a star pattern). It filters WeeklyReports by year '2022' and then counts distinct AgeGroups associated with those reports, grouped by Region label. All entity variables have `rdf:type` triples.
